data.cta_english: Was this Messi's most frustrating match ever? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: Spain completely destroyed Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final because they allowed Lionel Messi zero shots on goal.
segments.subtitle_english: Spain completely destroyed Argentina in the 2026 World Cup final because they allowed Lionel Messi zero shots on goal.
segments.voice_hindi: स्पेन ने 2026 विश्व कप फाइनल में अर्जेंटीना को पूरी तरह से नष्ट कर दिया क्योंकि उन्होंने लियोनेल मेस्सी को गोल पर शून्य शॉट लगाने की अनुमति दी थी।

segments.voice_english: Spain dominated the entire match with twenty total shots, but ten-man Argentina desperately defended to keep the score level.
segments.subtitle_english: Spain dominated the entire match with twenty total shots, but ten-man Argentina desperately defended to keep the score level.
segments.voice_hindi: पूरे मैच में कुल बीस शॉट्स के साथ स्पेन का दबदबा रहा, लेकिन दस खिलाड़ियों वाली अर्जेंटीना ने स्कोर बराबर बनाए रखने के लिए पूरी ताकत से बचाव किया।

segments.voice_english: The intense deadlock finally broke in extra time when Ferran Torres scored a beautiful goal to make Spain the champions.
segments.subtitle_english: The intense deadlock finally broke in extra time when Ferran Torres scored a beautiful goal to make Spain the champions.
segments.voice_hindi: यह गहन गतिरोध आखिरकार अतिरिक्त समय में टूटा जब फेरान टोरेस ने खूबसूरत गोल करके स्पेन को चैंपियन बना दिया।

segments.voice_english: Tempers flared after the final whistle because Leandro Paredes and Garcia clashed on the pitch during the celebrations.
segments.subtitle_english: Tempers flared after the final whistle because Leandro Paredes and Garcia clashed on the pitch during the celebrations.
segments.voice_hindi: अंतिम सीटी बजने के बाद गुस्सा भड़क गया क्योंकि जश्न के दौरान लिएंड्रो पेरेडेस और गार्सिया पिच पर भिड़ गए।

segments.voice_english: Spain swept the major tournament awards, so Messi finished his World Cup dream with zero shots in the final.
segments.subtitle_english: Spain swept the major tournament awards, so Messi finished his World Cup dream with zero shots in the final.
segments.voice_hindi: स्पेन ने प्रमुख टूर्नामेंट पुरस्कार जीते, इसलिए मेस्सी ने फाइनल में शून्य शॉट के साथ अपना विश्व कप सपना पूरा किया।

data.title_hindi: कैसे स्पेन ने मेस्सी को बंद कर दिया
data.youtube_title: Messi's World Cup Final Nightmare! 😭 Spain's Masterclass
title_options: Messi's World Cup Final Nightmare! 😭 Kaise hare?
data.description: World Cup 2026 Final mein Spain ne Argentina ko aise choke kiya ki kisi ne socha na tha! 🤯 20 shots vs 0 shots ka aisa dominance, jahan Ferran Torres ne extra-time mein goal maarke Argentina ka sapna tod diya. Kya Spain sach mein ye title deserve karti thi ya Argentina ke sath badluck hua? Comment mein batao! 👇

topic: Top 5 greatest underdog stories in football

data.hook_english: This 5000-to-1 shock will freeze your brain!
data.cta_english: Can any club repeat Leicester's 5000-to-1 miracle?

segments.voice_english: Leicester City was bottom of the league in April 2015, so they had to win seven of their last nine matches.
segments.subtitle_english: Leicester City was bottom of the league in April 2015, so they had to win seven of their last 9 matches.
segments.voice_hindi: अप्रैल 2015 में लीसेस्टर सिटी लीग में सबसे नीचे थी, इसलिए उन्हें अपने पिछले नौ मैचों में से सात में जीत हासिल करनी पड़ी।

segments.voice_english: Jamie Vardy was playing non-league football recently, when he suddenly scored in eleven consecutive games to break the Premier League record.
segments.subtitle_english: Jamie Vardy was playing non-league football recently, when he suddenly scored in eleven consecutive games to break the Premier League record.
segments.voice_hindi: जेमी वर्डी हाल ही में गैर-लीग फुटबॉल खेल रहे थे, जब उन्होंने अचानक लगातार ग्यारह मैचों में स्कोर बनाकर प्रीमियर लीग रिकॉर्ड तोड़ दिया।

segments.voice_english: Leicester shocked wealthy Manchester City in February, after Riyad Mahrez scored a great solo goal to secure a three one away win.
segments.subtitle_english: Leicester shocked wealthy Manchester City in February, after Riyad Mahrez scored a great solo goal to secure a 4 away win.
segments.voice_hindi: लीसेस्टर ने फरवरी में अमीर मैनचेस्टर सिटी को चौंका दिया, जब रियाद महरेज़ ने शानदार एकल गोल करके तीन एक से जीत हासिल की।

segments.voice_english: Tottenham lost their title hopes in May, because Eden Hazard scored in the 83rd minute to seal Leicester's league trophy.
segments.subtitle_english: Tottenham lost their title hopes in May, because Eden Hazard scored in the 83rd minute to seal Leicester's league trophy.
segments.voice_hindi: टोटेनहैम ने मई में अपनी खिताब की उम्मीदें खो दीं, क्योंकि ईडन हैज़र्ड ने 83वें मिनट में गोल करके लीसेस्टर की लीग ट्रॉफी पक्की कर दी।

segments.voice_english: Bookies gave Leicester five thousand to one odds, but Claudio Ranieri proudly lifted the Premier League trophy to finish it.
segments.subtitle_english: Bookies gave Leicester 5000 to one odds, but Claudio Ranieri proudly lifted the Premier League trophy to finish it.
segments.voice_hindi: सट्टेबाजों ने लीसेस्टर को एक के मुकाबले पांच हजार का भाव दिया, लेकिन क्लाउडियो रानिएरी ने इसे खत्म करने के लिए गर्व से प्रीमियर लीग ट्रॉफी उठाई।

data.youtube_title: Leicester City ka Insane Miracle! 🤯 Top 5 Underdog Stories
title_options: Leicester City ka Insane Miracle! 🤯 Top 5 Underdog Stories
Jamie Vardy ka Shocking Secret! 😱 Top 5 Underdog Stories
Leicester City ne Sabko Shock Kiya! 💀 Top 5 Underdogs
data.description: Leicester City ka wo 2015 season yaad hai? Jo bilkul impossible tha! 🤯 Jamie Vardy ki non-league se Premier League champion banne ki kahani sach me goosebumps de deti hai. Aapke hisab se football history ka sabse bada underdog moment kaunsa hai? Comment me batao! 👇⚽

segments.voice_english: No fame. No fortune. Just a young Zidane dreaming of conquering the world's biggest stadiums.
segments.image_query: poor kid playing football on a dusty street at sunset
segments.subtitle_english: Young Zinedine played on dusty streets, but he dreamt of football stadiums one day.
segments.voice_hindi: युवा जिनेदिन धूल भरी सड़कों पर खेलते थे, लेकिन उन्होंने एक दिन फुटबॉल स्टेडियम का सपना देखा।

segments.voice_english: He faced many years of development, but his vision and control set him apart.
segments.image_query: Zinedine Zidane playing as a young professional midfielder
segments.subtitle_english: He faced many years of development, but his vision and control set him apart.
segments.voice_hindi: उन्हें कई वर्षों के विकास का सामना करना पड़ा, लेकिन उनकी दूरदर्शिता और नियंत्रण ने उन्हें अलग कर दिया।

segments.voice_english: Zidane won the Ballon d'Or in 1998, because his skills defined pure football elegance.
segments.image_query: Zinedine Zidane holding the Ballon d'Or trophy
segments.subtitle_english: Zidane won the Ballon d'Or in 1998, because his skills defined pure football elegance.
segments.voice_hindi: ज़िदान ने 1998 में बैलन डी'ओर जीता, क्योंकि उनके कौशल ने शुद्ध फुटबॉल सुंदरता को परिभाषित किया।

segments.voice_english: He coached Real Madrid until 2021, and he proved greatness lasts beyond the pitch.
segments.image_query: Zinedine Zidane coaching Real Madrid on the sidelines
segments.subtitle_english: He coached Real Madrid until 2021, and he proved greatness lasts beyond the pitch.
segments.voice_hindi: उन्होंने 2021 तक रियल मैड्रिड को कोचिंग दी और उन्होंने साबित कर दिया कि महानता मैदान के परे भी रहती है।

data.description: Zizou ka wo magic jo dusty streets se lekar Ballon d'Or tak gaya! 🏆 Dekho kaise Zidane ne apni vision aur control se football ko ek naya level diya. Real Madrid ke coaching days se lekar unki legacy tak, sab kuch yahan hai. ✨ Aapke hisaab se Zizou ka best goal kaunsa tha? Comment mein batao! 👇
